title: multi-input support for Glassbox
summary:
I updated the fast path in Glassbox to support multiple inputs. Before, it was just one variable. Now it works for higher dimensions.

I added 1D slicing so the classifier handles multi-dimensional data correctly. I also added new basis functions like triple products (x0*x1*x2) and product-ratios. These are useful for physics formulas. I had to fix some divide-by-zero errors in the exponential terms too.

I updated the variable naming from 1-indexed to 0-indexed (x0, x1) to stay consistent. I ran the benchmarks and it solves "x0^2 + x1^2" in 0.43 seconds with zero error. Everything seems stable now.
commitMessages: feat: Add multi-input support and product-ratio basis to fast path
feat: Add multi-input support to fast path regression
